name: The Joylancer: Legendary Motor Knight Demo
description: After 256 years of peace in the lands of Antoria...the ROSELIAN ARMY OF BATRATHUM has risen up once more to attempt to reclaim the land of ANTORIA that they lost in the 43rd War of Darkness. Threatening to start War of Darkness 44, KING LANCELOT BARTHOLOMEW ROSELL of the ROSELIAN EMPIRE sends his beasts through the lands, corrupting and...
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Microsoft Windows XP or above
  • Processor: 1.4GHz processor
  • Memory: 1.5 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 8-compatible graphics card with at least 32MB of video memory
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 250 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: Microsoft XBOX 360 Controller or DirectInput-compatible controller
